title: wedeliella cristata
intro: Wedeliella cristata, also known as the Wedelia, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic properties. The health benefits of Wedeliella cristata include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating various skin conditions. It can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, and is often consumed as a decoction or infused in hot water to harness its medicinal properties.
